title: SDLC Record
description: A single software-development-lifecycle record (a node in the relational graph). Encodes the artifact set V from the position paper: each record has a type, content, and verifiable provenance.

id.description: Stable, dataset-unique identifier for this record.

type.description: Artifact type tau(v) from the formal framework.

content.description: Type-specific payload (title, body, path, code, log text, etc.). Free-form by type; kept small in public history. Large blobs live in object storage and are referenced by hash.

valid_from.description: Commit sha or ISO-8601 timestamp at which this record becomes valid (temporal-validity lower bound).

valid_until.description: Commit sha or ISO-8601 timestamp after which this record is superseded. Null means currently valid.

split.description: Frozen split assignment, when assigned at record granularity.

attributes.description: Optional derived or annotated attributes (owner, component, flaky flag, etc.).
